#Gibbs

Including Gibbs Sampling for multi-case with different objects.

-   Gibbs for general model,
-   Gibbs for hyper parameter (Empirical Bayes)
-   Gibbs for U.star (Generate new u.star)
## General Gibbs for All Parameter
```{r}
#' Unified Gibbs Sampler for EIV-GP Regression
#' 
#' @param type String, either "ordinal" or "nominal".
#' @param params A list containing all required parameters for the specific sampler.
#' @param seed Optional random seed.
#' @return A list of Gibbs samples (beta, sigma.u2, sigma.error2, U, f, etc.)
#' @export
gibbs <- function(type, params, seed = NULL) {
  
  # Validate the 'type' argument
  if (!(type %in% c("ordinal", "nominal"))) {
    stop("Error: 'type' must be either 'ordinal' or 'nominal'.")
  }
  
  # Set seed if provided
  if (!is.null(seed)) {
    set.seed(seed)
    params$seed <- NULL # Ensure seed in list doesn't override
  }
  
  # Dispatch to the specific sampler
  if (type == "ordinal") {
    message("Starting Gibbs sampling for ORDINAL latent variables...")
    return(do.call(gibbs.ordinal, params))
    
  } else if (type == "nominal") {
    message("Starting Gibbs sampling for NOMINAL latent variables...")
    return(do.call(gibbs.nominal, params))
  }
}


#' Gibbs Sampler for Ordinal Latent Variables
#' 
#' @param num.iter Number of MCMC iterations.
#' @param lmd Step size for Langevin Monte Carlo (LMC).
#' @param beta0 Initial vector of coefficients for u ~ X.
#' @param sigma.u20 Initial scalar variance for latent variable u.
#' @param sigma.error20 Initial variance for regression error.
#' @param Tau0 Initial vector of thresholds.
#' @param U0 Initial vector of latent variables u.
#' @param X Matrix of quantitative predictors.
#' @param c Vector of ordinal observed categories (1, 2, ..., m).
#' @param y Vector of response variables.
#' @param u.obs.idx Indices of observed u values.
#' @param U.obs Observed values of u.
#' @param u.lb Lower bound for latent u (default -Inf).
#' @param u.ub Upper bound for latent u (default Inf).
#' @param v0 Prior variance factor for intercept.
#' @param g Prior variance factor for coefficients (g-prior).
#' @param IG.a.u Inverse-Gamma prior shape for sigma.u2.
#' @param IG.b.u Inverse-Gamma prior rate for sigma.u2.
#' @param IG.a.error Inverse-Gamma prior shape for sigma.error2.
#' @param IG.b.error Inverse-Gamma prior rate for sigma.error2.
#' @param theta Length-scale parameters for the kernel.
#' @param rho Signal-to-noise ratio parameter for the kernel.
#' @param simu.f Logical. If TRUE, simulate the latent function f.
#' @param design.map Logical. If TRUE, use MAP estimates.
#' 
#' @return A list containing histories of sampled parameters.
gibbs.ordinal <- function (num.iter, lmd, 
                           beta0, sigma.u20, sigma.error20, Tau0, U0, 
                           X, c, y, u.obs.idx, U.obs, u.lb = -Inf, u.ub = Inf,
                           v0, g, IG.a.u, IG.b.u, IG.a.error, IG.b.error,
                           theta, rho, simu.f = TRUE, design.map = FALSE) {
  
  # Compute constants
  n <- length(c); m <- length(Tau0) + 1; d.x <- ncol(X); n.obs <- length(u.obs.idx)
  u.mis.idx <- if (n.obs > 0) c(1:n)[-u.obs.idx] else c(1:n)
  
  X.tilde <- cbind(1, X); XX.tilde <- t(X.tilde)%*%X.tilde
  V0 <- matrix(0, d.x+1, d.x+1); V0[1,1] <- v0; V0[-1,-1] <- g*XX.tilde[-1,-1]
  Vn <- V0 + XX.tilde; Vn.inv <- solve(Vn)
  
  if (design.map) {
    X.tilde.obs <- X.tilde[u.obs.idx, ]; XX.tilde.obs <- t(X.tilde.obs)%*%X.tilde.obs
    V0.obs <- matrix(0, d.x+1, d.x+1); V0.obs[1,1] <- v0; V0.obs[-1,-1] <- g*XX.tilde.obs[-1,-1]
    Vn.obs <- V0.obs + XX.tilde.obs; Vn.obs.inv <- solve(Vn.obs)
    mu.n.obs <- Vn.obs.inv%*%t(X.tilde.obs)%*%U.obs
    beta.map <- mu.n.obs
    sigma.u2.map <- (IG.b.u + (t(U.obs)%*%U.obs - t(mu.n.obs)%*%Vn.obs%*%mu.n.obs)/2)/(IG.a.u + n.obs/2 + (d.x+1)/2 + 1)
  }
  
  # Storage
  beta.hist <- matrix(0, d.x + 1, num.iter); sigma.u2.hist <- rep(0, num.iter)
  sigma.error2.hist <- rep(0, num.iter); Tau.hist <- matrix(0, m-1, num.iter)
  U.hist <- matrix(0, n, num.iter); accep <- rep(0, num.iter); f.hist <- matrix(0, n, num.iter)
  
  # Init
  beta <- beta0; sigma.u2 <- sigma.u20; sigma.error2 <- sigma.error20; Tau <- Tau0; U <- U0
  if (n.obs > 0) U[u.obs.idx] <- U.obs
  
  Theta <- c(theta, rho^2*sigma.error2); W <- cbind(X, U)
  KWW <- KernelMatrix(W, Theta); C <- KWW + sigma.error2*diag(n)
  C.chol <- t(chol(C)); r <- backsolve(t(C.chol), forwardsolve(C.chol, y))
  
  # MCMC Loop
  for (k in 1:num.iter) {
    if (design.map) { sigma.u2 <- sigma.u2.map; beta <- beta.map 
    } else {
      mu.n <- Vn.inv%*%t(X.tilde)%*%U
      sigma.u2 <- 1/rgamma(1, shape = IG.a.u + n/2, rate = IG.b.u + (t(U)%*%U - t(mu.n)%*%Vn%*%mu.n)/2)
      beta <- c(rmvnorm(1, mu.n, sigma.u2*Vn.inv))
    }
    sigma.u2.hist[k] <- sigma.u2; beta.hist[, k] <- beta 
    
    sigma.error2.prime <- 1/rgamma(1, shape = IG.a.error + n/2, rate = IG.b.error + sigma.error2/2*t(y)%*%r)
    Theta <- c(theta, rho^2*sigma.error2.prime); KWW <- (sigma.error2.prime/sigma.error2)*KWW
    C <- (sigma.error2.prime/sigma.error2)*C; C.chol <- sqrt(sigma.error2.prime/sigma.error2)*C.chol
    r <- (sigma.error2/sigma.error2.prime)*r; sigma.error2 <- sigma.error2.prime
    sigma.error2.hist[k] <- sigma.error2
    
    for (j in 1:(m-1)) Tau[j] <- runif(1, max(U[c == j]), min(U[c == j+1]))
    Tau.hist[, k] <- Tau
    
    phi <- backsolve(t(C.chol), rnorm(n))
    GU <- Gradient(U, r, phi, KWW, theta[d.x+1], X.tilde, beta, sigma.u2)
    Tau.aug <- c(u.lb, Tau, u.ub); U.mis <- U[u.mis.idx]
    U.mis.prime <- DrawTrunNormal(U.mis + lmd^2/2*GU[u.mis.idx], rep(lmd, length(u.mis.idx)), Tau.aug[c[u.mis.idx]], Tau.aug[c[u.mis.idx]+1])
    
    U.prime <- U; U.prime[u.mis.idx] <- U.mis.prime
    W.prime <- cbind(X, U.prime); KWW.prime <- KernelMatrix(W.prime, Theta)
    C.prime <- KWW.prime + sigma.error2*diag(n); C.prime.chol <- t(chol(C.prime))
    r.prime <- backsolve(t(C.prime.chol), forwardsolve(C.prime.chol, y))
    GU.prime <- Gradient(U.prime, r.prime, phi, KWW.prime, theta[d.x+1], X.tilde, beta, sigma.u2) 
    
    p.u <- pnorm(Tau.aug[c[u.mis.idx]+1], mean = U.mis + lmd^2/2*GU[u.mis.idx], sd = lmd) - pnorm(Tau.aug[c[u.mis.idx]], mean = U.mis + lmd^2/2*GU[u.mis.idx], sd = lmd) 
    p.u.prime <- pnorm(Tau.aug[c[u.mis.idx]+1], mean = U.mis.prime + lmd^2/2*GU.prime[u.mis.idx], sd = lmd) - pnorm(Tau.aug[c[u.mis.idx]], mean = U.mis.prime + lmd^2/2*GU.prime[u.mis.idx], sd = lmd) 
    log.ratio <- try(sum(log(p.u)) - sum(log(p.u.prime)), TRUE)
    if (inherits(log.ratio, "try-error")) log.ratio <- 0
    
    logp <- min(0, -(t(y)%*%(r.prime - r) + t(phi)%*%(C.prime - C)%*%phi)/2 - 
                  sum((U.prime - X.tilde%*%beta)^2 - (U - X.tilde%*%beta)^2)/(2*sigma.u2) + 
                  sum((U.mis.prime - U.mis - lmd^2/2*GU[u.mis.idx])^2 - (U.mis - U.mis.prime - lmd^2/2*GU.prime[u.mis.idx])^2)/(2*lmd^2) + log.ratio)
    
    if(log(runif(1)) <= logp){ U <- U.prime; W <- W.prime; KWW <- KWW.prime; C <- C.prime; C.chol <- C.prime.chol; r <- r.prime; accep[k] <- 1 }
    U.hist[, k] <- U
    
    if (simu.f) {
      LiK <- apply(KWW, 2, function(b) forwardsolve(C.chol, b))
      f.hist[, k] <- rmvnorm(1, KWW%*%r, KWW - t(LiK)%*%LiK)
    }
  }
  return(list(beta.hist = beta.hist, sigma.u2.hist = sigma.u2.hist, sigma.error2.hist = sigma.error2.hist,
              Tau.hist = Tau.hist, U.hist = U.hist, accep = accep, f.hist = f.hist))
}


#' Gibbs Sampler for Nominal Latent Variables
#' 
#' @param num.iter Number of MCMC iterations.
#' @param lmd Step size for Langevin Monte Carlo (LMC).
#' @param beta0 Initial matrix of coefficients (formerly B.tilde0).
#' @param sigma.u20 Initial covariance matrix for latent u (formerly Sigma.u0).
#' @param sigma.error20 Initial variance for regression error.
#' @param gamma.mat0 Initial matrix for nominal classification (gamma).
#' @param U0 Initial matrix for latent variables u (n x d).
#' @param m Number of nominal categories.
#' @param c Vector of nominal observed categories.
#' @param X Matrix of quantitative predictors.
#' @param y Vector of response variables.
#' @param u.obs.idx Indices of observed u rows.
#' @param U.obs Observed values of u (matrix).
#' @param v0 Prior variance factor for intercept.
#' @param g Prior variance factor for coefficients (g-prior).
#' @param nu0 Degrees of freedom for inverse-wishart prior.
#' @param Psi0 Scale matrix for inverse-wishart prior.
#' @param q0 Prior precision for gamma intercept.
#' @param q.gamma Prior precision for gamma coefficients.
#' @param IG.a.error Inverse-Gamma prior shape for sigma.error2.
#' @param IG.b.error Inverse-Gamma prior rate for sigma.error2.
#' @param theta Length-scale parameters for the kernel.
#' @param rho Signal-to-noise ratio parameter for the kernel.
#' @param simu.f Logical. If TRUE, simulate the latent function f.
#' @param design.map Logical. If TRUE, use MAP estimates.
#' 
#' @return A list containing histories of sampled parameters.
gibbs.nominal <- function (num.iter, lmd,
                           beta0, sigma.u20, sigma.error20, gamma.mat0, U0, 
                           m, c, X, y, u.obs.idx, U.obs,
                           v0, g, nu0, Psi0, q0, q.gamma, IG.a.error, IG.b.error,
                           theta, rho, simu.f = TRUE, design.map = FALSE) {
  
  # Constants
  n <- nrow(X); d.x <- ncol(X); d <- ncol(U0); n.obs <- length(u.obs.idx)
  u.mis.idx <- if (n.obs > 0) c(1:n)[-u.obs.idx] else c(1:n)
  
  bin.encoding <- BinaryEncode(c, m)
  N.mat <- bin.encoding$N.mat; kappa.mat <- bin.encoding$kappa.mat
  
  X.tilde <- cbind(1, X); XX.tilde <- t(X.tilde)%*%X.tilde
  V0 <- matrix(0, d.x+1, d.x+1); V0[1,1] <- v0; V0[-1,-1] <- g*XX.tilde[-1,-1]
  Vn <- V0 + XX.tilde; Vn.inv <- as.symmetric.matrix(solve(Vn)) 
  Q0.gamma <- diag(c(q0, rep(q.gamma, d)))
  
  if (design.map) {
    nun.obs <- nu0 + n.obs; X.tilde.obs <- X.tilde[u.obs.idx, ]
    XX.tilde.obs <- t(X.tilde.obs)%*%X.tilde.obs
    V0.obs <- matrix(0, d.x+1, d.x+1); V0.obs[1,1] <- v0; V0.obs[-1,-1] <- g*XX.tilde.obs[-1,-1]
    Vn.obs <- V0.obs + XX.tilde.obs; Vn.obs.inv <- solve(Vn.obs)
    Mn.obs <- Vn.obs.inv%*%t(X.tilde.obs)%*%U.obs
    Psin.obs <- Psi0 + t(U.obs)%*%U.obs - t(Mn.obs)%*%Vn.obs%*%Mn.obs
    beta.map <- Mn.obs; sigma.u.map <- Psin.obs/(nun.obs+d.x+1+d+1)
  }
  
  # Storage
  beta.hist <- matrix(0, d.x+1, d*num.iter); sigma.u2.hist <- matrix(0, d, d*num.iter)
  sigma.error2.hist <- rep(0, num.iter); gamma.mat.hist <- matrix(0, m-1, (d+1)*num.iter)
  U.hist <- matrix(0, n, d*num.iter); accep <- rep(0, num.iter); f.hist <- matrix(0, n, num.iter)
  
  # Init
  B.tilde <- beta0; Sigma.u <- sigma.u20; sigma.error2 <- sigma.error20; gamma.mat <- gamma.mat0; U <- U0
  if (n.obs > 0) U[u.obs.idx, ] <- U.obs
  omega.mat <- matrix(0, n, m-1); mn.u <- matrix(0, n, d)
  Qn.u <- array(0, c(d,d,n)); Qn.u.inv <- array(0, c(d,d,n))
  
  Theta <- c(theta, rho^2*sigma.error2); W <- cbind(X, U)
  KWW <- KernelMatrix(W, Theta); C <- KWW + sigma.error2*diag(n)
  C.chol <- t(chol(C)); r <- backsolve(t(C.chol), forwardsolve(C.chol, y))
  
  for (k.iter in 1:num.iter) {
    if (design.map) { Sigma.u <- sigma.u.map; B.tilde <- beta.map
    } else {
      nun <- nu0 + n; Mn <- Vn.inv%*%t(X.tilde)%*%U; Psin <- Psi0 + t(U)%*%U - t(Mn)%*%Vn%*%Mn
      Sigma.u <- rinvwishart(nun, Psin); B.tilde <- rmatrixnorm(Mn, Vn.inv, Sigma.u)
    }
    sigma.u2.hist[, ((k.iter-1)*d+1):(k.iter*d)] <- Sigma.u
    beta.hist[, ((k.iter-1)*d+1):(k.iter*d)] <- B.tilde
    
    sigma.error2.prime <- 1/rgamma(1, shape = IG.a.error + n/2, rate = IG.b.error + sigma.error2/2*t(y)%*%r)
    Theta <- c(theta, rho^2*sigma.error2.prime)
    KWW <- (sigma.error2.prime/sigma.error2)*KWW; C <- (sigma.error2.prime/sigma.error2)*C
    C.chol <- sqrt(sigma.error2.prime/sigma.error2)*C.chol
    r <- (sigma.error2/sigma.error2.prime)*r; sigma.error2 <- sigma.error2.prime
    sigma.error2.hist[k.iter] <- sigma.error2
    
    U.tilde <- cbind(1, U); psi.mat <- U.tilde%*%t(gamma.mat)
    omega.mat[N.mat == 1] <- pgdraw(1, psi.mat[N.mat == 1])
    
    for (j in 1:(m-1)) {
      Qn.gamma <- Q0.gamma + t(U.tilde)%*%diag(omega.mat[, j])%*%U.tilde
      mn.gamma <- solve(Qn.gamma)%*%t(U.tilde)%*%kappa.mat[, j]
      gamma.mat[j, ] <- rmvnorm(1, mn.gamma, solve(Qn.gamma))
    }
    gamma.mat.hist[, ((k.iter-1)*(d+1)+1):(k.iter*(d+1))] <- gamma.mat
    
    phi <- backsolve(t(C.chol), rnorm(n)); Sigma.u.inv <- solve(Sigma.u)
    for (i in 1:n) {
      Qn.u[,,i] <-  Sigma.u.inv + t(gamma.mat[,-1])%*%diag(omega.mat[i,])%*%gamma.mat[,-1]
      Qn.u.inv[,,i] <- solve(Qn.u[,,i])
      mn.u[i, ] <- Qn.u.inv[,,i]%*%(Sigma.u.inv%*%t(B.tilde)%*%X.tilde[i,] + t(gamma.mat[,-1])%*%(kappa.mat[i,] - omega.mat[i,]*gamma.mat[, 1]))
    }
    GU <- Gradient(U, phi, r, KWW, mn.u, Qn.u, theta[d.x+1])
    U.mis <- U[u.mis.idx, ]; U.mis.prime <- U.mis + lmd^2/2*GU[u.mis.idx, ] + lmd*rnorm(length(u.mis.idx)*d)
    
    U.prime <- U; U.prime[u.mis.idx, ] <- U.mis.prime
    W.prime <- cbind(X, U.prime); KWW.prime <- KernelMatrix(W.prime, Theta)
    C.prime <- KWW.prime + sigma.error2*diag(n); C.prime.chol <- t(chol(C.prime))
    r.prime <- backsolve(t(C.prime.chol), forwardsolve(C.prime.chol, y))
    GU.prime <- Gradient(U.prime, phi, r.prime, KWW.prime, mn.u, Qn.u, theta[d.x+1])
    
    logp.gau <- sapply(u.mis.idx, function(i) {
      t(U.prime[i,] - mn.u[i,])%*%Qn.u[,,i]%*%(U.prime[i,] - mn.u[i,]) - t(U[i,] - mn.u[i,])%*%Qn.u[,,i]%*%(U[i,] - mn.u[i,])
    })
    logp <- min(0, -sum(logp.gau)/2 - (t(y)%*%(r.prime - r) + t(phi)%*%(C.prime - C)%*%phi)/2 + 
                  sum((U.mis.prime - U.mis - lmd^2/2*GU[u.mis.idx,])^2 - (U.mis - U.mis.prime - lmd^2/2*GU.prime[u.mis.idx,])^2)/(2*lmd^2))
    
    if (log(runif(1)) <= logp) { U <- U.prime; W <- W.prime; KWW <- KWW.prime; C <- C.prime; C.chol <- C.prime.chol; r <- r.prime; accep[k.iter] <- 1 }
    U.hist[, ((k.iter-1)*d+1):(k.iter*d)] <- U
    
    if (simu.f) {
      LiK <- apply(KWW, 2, function(b) forwardsolve(C.chol, b))
      f.hist[, k.iter] <- rmvnorm(1, KWW%*%r, KWW - t(LiK)%*%LiK)
    }
  }
  return(list(beta.hist = beta.hist, sigma.u2.hist = sigma.u2.hist, sigma.error2.hist = sigma.error2.hist,
              gamma.mat.hist = gamma.mat.hist, U.hist = U.hist, accep = accep, f.hist = f.hist))
}

```


## Empirical Bayes Gibbs Sampler
```{r}
#' Unified Empirical Bayes Gibbs Sampler
#' 
#' @param type String. Must be either "ordinal" or "nominal".
#' @param params A list containing all model parameters.
#' @param seed Optional random seed for reproducibility.
#' 
#' @return A list of sampled parameters from the latent EB model.
gibbs.eb <- function(type, params, seed = NULL) {
  
  # Validate type input
  if (!(type %in% c("ordinal", "nominal"))) {
    stop("Input Error: 'type' must be 'ordinal' or 'nominal'.")
  }
  
  # Set seed if provided
  if (!is.null(seed)) {
    set.seed(seed)
    params$seed <- NULL 
  }
  
  # Dispatch to the specific worker function using do.call
  if (type == "ordinal") {
    return(do.call(gibbs.eb.ordinal, params))
  } else {
    return(do.call(gibbs.eb.nominal, params))
  }
}


#' Empirical Bayes Gibbs Sampler for Ordinal Latent Variables
#' 
#' @param n.mc Number of MCMC iterations.
#' @param beta0 Initial vector of coefficients for u ~ X.
#' @param sigma.u20 Initial scalar variance for latent variable u.
#' @param Tau0 Initial vector of thresholds.
#' @param U0 Initial vector of latent variables u.
#' @param X Matrix of quantitative predictors.
#' @param c Vector of ordinal observed categories.
#' @param u.obs.idx Indices of observed u values.
#' @param U.obs Observed values of u.
#' @param u.lb Lower bound for latent u (default -Inf).
#' @param u.ub Upper bound for latent u (default Inf).
#' @param v0 Prior variance factor for intercept.
#' @param g Prior variance factor for coefficients (g-prior).
#' @param IG.a.u Inverse-Gamma prior shape for sigma.u2.
#' @param IG.b.u Inverse-Gamma prior rate for sigma.u2.
#' 
#' @return A list containing history of sampled parameters.
gibbs.eb.ordinal <- function (n.mc, 
                              beta0, sigma.u20, Tau0, U0, 
                              X, c, u.obs.idx, U.obs, u.lb = -Inf, u.ub = Inf,
                              v0, g, IG.a.u, IG.b.u) {
  
  # Compute constants
  n <- nrow(X); m <- length(Tau0) + 1; d.x <- ncol(X)
  X.tilde <- cbind(1, X); XX.tilde <- t(X.tilde)%*%X.tilde
  
  # Set up prior variance Vn
  V0 <- matrix(0, d.x+1, d.x+1); V0[1,1] <- v0; V0[-1,-1] <- g*XX.tilde[-1,-1]
  Vn <- V0 + XX.tilde; Vn.inv <- solve(Vn)
  
  # Identify missing indices
  u.mis.idx <- if (length(u.obs.idx) > 0) c(1:n)[-u.obs.idx] else c(1:n)
  
  # Initialize parameters
  beta <- beta0; sigma.u2 <- sigma.u20; Tau <- Tau0; U <- U0
  if (length(u.obs.idx) > 0) U[u.obs.idx] <- U.obs 
  
  # Storage
  beta.hist <- matrix(0, d.x+1, n.mc); sigma.u2.hist <- rep(0, n.mc)
  Tau.hist <- matrix(0, m-1, n.mc); U.hist <- matrix(0, n, n.mc)
  
  # Gibbs Sampling Loop
  for (k in 1:n.mc) {
    # 1. Update beta & sigma.u2
    mu.n <- Vn.inv%*%t(X.tilde)%*%U
    sigma.u2 <- 1/rgamma(1, shape = IG.a.u + n/2, rate = IG.b.u + (t(U)%*%U - t(mu.n)%*%Vn%*%mu.n)/2)
    beta <- c(rmvnorm(1, mu.n, sigma.u2*Vn.inv))
    
    sigma.u2.hist[k] <- sigma.u2; beta.hist[, k] <- beta 
    
    # 2. Update Tau
    for (j in 1:(m-1)) {
      Tau[j] <- runif(1, max(U[c == j]), min(U[c == j+1]))
    }
    Tau.hist[, k] <- Tau
    
    # 3. Update missing U via Truncated Normal
    Tau.aug <- c(u.lb, Tau, u.ub)
    U[u.mis.idx] <- DrawTrunNormal(X.tilde[u.mis.idx, ] %*% beta, 
                                  rep(sqrt(sigma.u2), length(u.mis.idx)), 
                                  Tau.aug[c[u.mis.idx]], Tau.aug[c[u.mis.idx]+1])
    U.hist[, k] <- U
  }
  
  return(list(beta.hist = beta.hist, 
              sigma.u2.hist = sigma.u2.hist,
              Tau.hist = Tau.hist,
              U.hist = U.hist))
}


#' Empirical Bayes Gibbs Sampler for Nominal Latent Variables
#' 
#' @param n.mc Number of MCMC iterations.
#' @param beta0 Initial matrix of coefficients (formerly B.tilde0).
#' @param sigma.u20 Initial covariance matrix for latent u (formerly Sigma.u0).
#' @param gamma.mat0 Initial matrix for nominal classification.
#' @param U0 Initial matrix of latent variables u.
#' @param X Matrix of quantitative predictors.
#' @param c Vector of nominal observed categories.
#' @param m Number of categories.
#' @param u.obs.idx Indices of observed u values.
#' @param U.obs Observed values of u (matrix).
#' @param v0,g Prior variance factors.
#' @param nu0,Psi0 Prior for Sigma.u (Inverse-Wishart).
#' @param q0,q.gamma Prior for gamma coefficients.
#' 
#' @return A list containing history of sampled parameters.
gibbs.eb.nominal <- function (n.mc,
                              beta0, sigma.u20, gamma.mat0, U0,
                              X, c, m, u.obs.idx, U.obs,
                              v0, g, nu0, Psi0, q0, q.gamma) {
  
  # Map integrated names to internal logic
  B.tilde <- beta0; Sigma.u <- sigma.u20; gamma.mat <- gamma.mat0; U <- U0
  
  # Compute constants
  n <- nrow(X); d.x <- ncol(X); d <- ncol(U0)
  u.mis.idx <- if (length(u.obs.idx) > 0) c(1:n)[-u.obs.idx] else c(1:n)
  
  # Polya-Gamma encoding
  bin.encoding <- BinaryEncode(c, m)
  N.mat <- bin.encoding$N.mat; kappa.mat <- bin.encoding$kappa.mat
  
  X.tilde <- cbind(1, X); XX.tilde <- t(X.tilde)%*%X.tilde
  V0 <- matrix(0, d.x+1, d.x+1); V0[1,1] <- v0; V0[-1,-1] <- g*XX.tilde[-1,-1]
  Vn <- V0 + XX.tilde; Vn.inv <- solve(Vn)
  Q0.gamma <- diag(c(q0, rep(q.gamma, d)))
  
  # Storage
  B.tilde.hist <- matrix(0, d.x+1, d*n.mc)
  Sigma.u.hist <- matrix(0, d, d*n.mc)
  gamma.mat.hist <- matrix(0, m-1, (d+1)*n.mc)
  U.hist <- matrix(0, n, d*n.mc)
  
  if (length(u.obs.idx) > 0) U[u.obs.idx, ] <- U.obs
  omega.mat <- matrix(0, n, m-1)
  
  # Gibbs Sampling Loop
  for (k.iter in 1:n.mc) {
    # 1. Update B.tilde (beta) & Sigma.u (sigma.u2)
    nun <- nu0 + n
    Mn <- Vn.inv %*% t(X.tilde) %*% U
    Psin <- Psi0 + t(U) %*% U - t(Mn) %*% Vn %*% Mn
    
    Sigma.u <- rinvwishart(nun, Psin)
    B.tilde <- rmatrixnorm(Mn, Vn.inv, Sigma.u)
    
    Sigma.u.hist[, ((k.iter-1)*d+1):(k.iter*d)] <- Sigma.u
    B.tilde.hist[, ((k.iter-1)*d+1):(k.iter*d)] <- B.tilde 
    
    # 2. Update Polya-Gamma auxiliary variables (omega)
    U.tilde <- cbind(1, U)
    psi.mat <- U.tilde %*% t(gamma.mat)
    omega.mat[N.mat == 1] <- pgdraw(1, psi.mat[N.mat == 1])
    
    # 3. Update nominal coefficients (gamma)
    for (j in 1:(m-1)) {
      Qn.gamma <- Q0.gamma + t(U.tilde) %*% diag(omega.mat[, j]) %*% U.tilde
      mn.gamma <- solve(Qn.gamma) %*% t(U.tilde) %*% kappa.mat[, j]
      gamma.mat[j, ] <- rmvnorm(1, mn.gamma, solve(Qn.gamma))
    }
    gamma.mat.hist[, ((k.iter-1)*(d+1)+1):(k.iter*(d+1))] <- gamma.mat
    
    # 4. Update missing U
    Sigma.u.inv <- solve(Sigma.u)
    for (i in u.mis.idx) {
      Qn.u <- Sigma.u.inv + t(gamma.mat[,-1]) %*% diag(omega.mat[i,]) %*% gamma.mat[,-1]
      Qn.u.inv <- solve(Qn.u)
      mn.u <- Qn.u.inv %*% (Sigma.u.inv %*% t(B.tilde) %*% X.tilde[i,] + 
                            t(gamma.mat[,-1]) %*% (kappa.mat[i,] - omega.mat[i,] * gamma.mat[,1]))
      U[i, ] <- rmvnorm(1, mn.u, Qn.u.inv)
    }
    U.hist[, ((k.iter-1)*d+1):(k.iter*d)] <- U
  }
  
  return(list(beta.hist = B.tilde.hist,
              sigma.u2.hist = Sigma.u.hist,
              gamma.mat.hist = gamma.mat.hist,
              U.hist = U.hist))
}

```
## U.star Generator
```{r}
#' Unified Gibbs Sampler for Latent Variable Prediction (U*)
#' 
#' @param type String. Must be either "ordinal" or "nominal".
#' @param params A list containing the required parameters and posterior history.
#' @param seed Optional random seed for reproducibility.
#' 
#' @return A matrix/list of sampled latent variables U* for new input points.
gibbs.predict <- function(type, params, seed = NULL) {
  
  # Validate type input
  if (!(type %in% c("ordinal", "nominal"))) {
    stop("Input Error: 'type' must be 'ordinal' or 'nominal'.")
  }
  
  # Set seed if provided
  if (!is.null(seed)) {
    set.seed(seed)
    params$seed <- NULL 
  }
  
  # Dispatch to specific worker function
  if (type == "ordinal") {
    return(do.call(gibbs.predict.ordinal, params))
  } else {
    return(do.call(gibbs.predict.nominal, params))
  }
}

#' Sample Latent Variables for New Ordinal Inputs
#' 
#' @param X.star Matrix of new quantitative predictors (test points).
#' @param c.star Vector of new ordinal observed categories.
#' @param beta.hist Matrix of posterior samples of beta.
#' @param sigma.u2.hist Vector of posterior samples of sigma.u2.
#' @param Tau.hist Matrix of posterior samples of thresholds.
#' @param u.lb Lower bound for latent u (default -Inf).
#' @param u.ub Upper bound for latent u (default Inf).
#' @param seed Optional random seed.
#' 
#' @return A matrix of sampled U* values (n.star x n.mc).
#' @export
gibbs.predict.ordinal <- function (X.star, c.star, beta.hist, sigma.u2.hist, Tau.hist, 
                                   u.lb = -Inf, u.ub = Inf, seed = 222) {
  
  if (!is.null(seed)) set.seed(seed)
  
  # Constants
  n.mc <- ncol(Tau.hist)    # Number of posterior samples
  n.star <- length(c.star)  # Number of new test points
  X.star.tilde <- cbind(1, X.star)
  
  # Storage
  U.star.hist <- matrix(0, nrow = n.star, ncol = n.mc)

  # Simulation Loop
  for (idx in 1:n.mc) {
    # Extract posterior sample at current iteration
    beta <- beta.hist[, idx]
    sigma.u2 <- sigma.u2.hist[idx]
    Tau <- Tau.hist[, idx]
    Tau.aug <- c(u.lb, Tau, u.ub)
    
    # Draw U.star from Truncated Normal
    U.star <- DrawTrunNormal(X.star.tilde %*% beta, 
                             rep(sqrt(sigma.u2), n.star), 
                             Tau.aug[c.star], 
                             Tau.aug[c.star + 1])
    U.star.hist[, idx] <- U.star
  }
  
  return(U.star.hist)
}

#' Sample Latent Variables for New Nominal Inputs
#' 
#' @param X.star Matrix of new quantitative predictors (test points).
#' @param c.star Vector of new nominal observed categories.
#' @param beta.hist Matrix of posterior samples of coefficients (formerly B.tilde.hist).
#' @param sigma.u2.hist Matrix of posterior samples of Sigma.u (formerly Sigma.u.hist).
#' @param gamma.mat.hist Matrix of posterior samples of gamma coefficients.
#' @param U0 Initial matrix for the inner-loop Gibbs (n.star x d).
#' @param num.iter Number of inner-loop Gibbs iterations to reach convergence for each sample.
#' @param seed Optional random seed.
#' 
#' @return A matrix of sampled U* values (n.star x (d * n.mc)).
#' @export
gibbs.predict.nominal <- function (X.star, c.star, beta.hist, sigma.u2.hist, gamma.mat.hist, 
                                   U0, num.iter, seed = 222) {
  
  if(!is.null(seed)) set.seed(seed)
  
  # Maps integrated names to nominal logic
  B.tilde.hist <- beta.hist
  Sigma.u.hist <- sigma.u2.hist
  
  # Constants
  n <- length(c.star)
  m <- nrow(gamma.mat.hist) + 1
  d <- ncol(U0)
  n.mc <- ncol(Sigma.u.hist) / d   
  
  # Polya-Gamma encoding for new categories
  bin.encoding <- BinaryEncode(c.star, m)
  N.mat <- bin.encoding$N.mat
  kappa.mat <- bin.encoding$kappa.mat
  X.star.tilde <- cbind(1, X.star)
  
  # Storage
  U.hist <- matrix(0, n, d * n.mc)
  
  # Simulation Loop
  for (idx in 1:n.mc) {
    # Initialize for inner loop
    U <- U0
    omega.mat <- matrix(0, n, m - 1) 
    
    # Extract posterior samples
    B.tilde <- B.tilde.hist[, ((idx - 1) * d + 1):(idx * d)]
    Sigma.u <- Sigma.u.hist[, ((idx - 1) * d + 1):(idx * d)]
    Sigma.u.inv <- solve(Sigma.u)
    gamma.mat <- gamma.mat.hist[, ((idx - 1) * (d + 1) + 1):(idx * (d + 1))]
    
    # Inner-loop Gibbs for {U*, omega*}
    for (k.iter in 1:num.iter) {
      # 1. Update Polya-Gamma omega
      U.tilde <- cbind(1, U)
      psi.mat <- U.tilde %*% t(gamma.mat)
      omega.mat[N.mat == 1] <- pgdraw(1, psi.mat[N.mat == 1])
      
      # 2. Update latent U using multivariate normal full conditional
      for (i in 1:n) {
        Qn.u <- Sigma.u.inv + t(gamma.mat[, -1]) %*% diag(omega.mat[i, ]) %*% gamma.mat[, -1]
        Qn.u.inv <- solve(Qn.u)
        mn.u <- Qn.u.inv %*% (Sigma.u.inv %*% t(B.tilde) %*% X.star.tilde[i, ] + 
                             t(gamma.mat[, -1]) %*% (kappa.mat[i, ] - omega.mat[i, ] * gamma.mat[, 1]))
        U[i, ] <- rmvnorm(1, mn.u, Qn.u.inv)
      }
    }
    
    # Save the imputed U* for current posterior sample
    U.hist[, ((idx - 1) * d + 1):(idx * d)] <- U
  }
  
  return(U.hist)
}

```
